notes: Concordia AI produces the Frontier AI Risk Management Framework, a comprehensive approach to managing risks from frontier AI systems.

data.description: Comprehensive framework for managing severe risks from general-purpose AI models, developed by Shanghai AI Laboratory and Concordia AI.
data.notes: China's first comprehensive frontier AI risk management framework. Uses E-T-C (Environment, Threat source, Capability) analysis methodology. Defines Red/Yellow/Green risk zones with clear thresholds: Green (routine deployment, continuous monitoring), Yellow (strengthened mitigations, controlled deployment), Red (suspend development/deployment). Covers seven risk areas. Released at World AI Conference 2025 in Shanghai. Accompanying technical report evaluated 20+ models across 7 risk domains.

versions_available.note: First edition. Seven risk areas, E-T-C analysis, Red/Yellow/Green zone system.

children.description: Frontier AI RMF risk area (lowercase kebab-case)

data.note: No per-risk-area URL. Risk areas are sections within the framework document. Seven risk areas: cyber offense, biological & chemical risks, persuasion & manipulation, uncontrolled autonomous AI R&D, strategic deception & scheming, self-replication, and collusion.
